titleStmt.title: SII 11.97: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 97. (B.K. No. 84 of 1926-27). MUḶGUND, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP BEHIND THE NAGARĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Traiḷōkyamalladēva (Sōmēśvara I). It registers a gift of land made to Dhruvēśvara-Paṇḍita, a disciple of Gaṅgarāśi- Paṇḍitadēva for the feeding, etc., of ascetics in the maṭha attached to the Nagarēśvara (temple) by the Seṭṭis, the Gāmuṇḍas, the One Hundred and Twenty Mahājanas and other public bodies (of the place) in the presence of Mahāsāmanta Sindara-Bhīmarasa, described as “the lord of Muḷugundapura” and “the ornament to the race of Kunnāla”. It is stated that Mahāsāmanta Āycharasa was then administering the Muḷugunda Twelve division and Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Per[māḷa-Māda]rasa who bore the title ‘the destroyer of Rājādhirāja-Chōḷa’ and was ‘the champion of Maiḷaladēvī’ was governing the Beḷvala Three Hundred and Purigeṟe Three Hundred provinces. Kunnala-vaṁśa is referred to in No. 47 above.

The record is dated Śaka year Nine Hundred and eighty-four, Śubhakṛit, Pushya, śu. 5, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti. The Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti in the given year fell on Pushya ba. 5 which was Monday, December 23, A.D. 1062. Śu. 5 is evidently a mistake for ba. 5.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṅgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
© Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya(ḥ) . jayatyudadhimanthanōthita viṣāgnidarppaupahasvapādanakhadarppaṇā
rppita surēṁdracūḍāmaṇigaḷadrudhirabudbudacchuritasiṁhacarmmāṁsukasphuradbrihadurasthaḷa sthitabhu
jagahārō haraḥ . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirājaparamēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī matraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānemā
caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ subhaṭamadanamahē
śvaraṁ tripuraharalabdhavaraprasādaṁ tyāgavinōdaṁ muṟuḍiya maṇḍaḷikabirudabhaṅgāṟaṁ maiḷaladēviyaṁkakāṟaṁ traiḷōkya
makaradhvajaṁ bijeyakīrttidhvajaṁ cakragoṭṭadāvanaḷaṁ nadaṭa kāḷānaḷaṁ cōḷakuḷa kāḷadaṇḍaṁ sabarebalgaṁṇḍaṁ kaligaḷārādhya nā
rggamasādhyaṁ pracaṇḍamaṇḍaḷikanaranārasiṁhanayya nasiṅganāhavakutūhaḷa nahitakōḷāhaḷaṁ jagadēkavīraṁ vīrāvatāraṁ
ṭṭeyamunniṟivaṁ cōḷarājādhirāja paracakrasādhana birudaraṁkusaṁ ghaṭiyaṁtte saṁki
bhāvanagandhavāraṇaṁ cāḷukyasantāraṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvara caṭṭaṁ cōḷagharaṭṭaṁ rājādhirājacōḷaṁgondaṁ śrīmatpe
rmmāḷamādarasar beḷvala mūnūṟuṁ purigeṟemūnūṟumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadi nāḷuttamire . samadhigatapaṁ
camahāśabda mahāsāmanta vijayalakṣmīkānta māgaḍi sūṟekāṟaṁ bibbalanaṁkakāṟa bandujanāśraya nāśri
tajanakalpavrikṣaṁ nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ . śrīmanmahāsāmanta yāycarasaru muḷgundapanne
raḍumaṁ nirābādeyindā ḷuttamire . pūṇdiṟe vidviṣṭaduṣṭara nugrājiyoḷikke
geldu saraṇāyātarkkaḷaṁtāḷdi dhātriyamanyanṛpācārakke pōlāge vistaradiṁ pāḷise kīrttiyaṁ bhu
vanadoḷu prākāśanaṁ māḍidaṁ . samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmanta vijayalakṣmīkānta muḷugundapurava
rēśvaraṁ phaṇipatākēśvaraṁ sindakuḷakamaḷa mārttaṇḍaṁ nuḍidantegaṇḍaṁ kunnālavaṁśalalāma guṇagaṇōddāma kaligaṇḍatoṇḍaṁ ka
danapracaṇḍa ripunripabhayaṁkaraṁ satyaratnākaraṁ saujanyajanamanōraṁjana caturacaturānana bhayalōbhavarjjita vikramō
pārjjita darppiṣṭa duṣṭārātimadanivāraṇa kaṁcanagandhavāraṇa sahajamanōja hayavatsarājakoṅga manneyabaṅgāṟa
māvanaṁkakāṟa śrīvādimahāpraḷeyakālabhairevapaṇḍitadēvara pādārādhakaṁ parabaḷasādhakaṁ nāmādisamastaprasasti
sahitaṁ śrimanmahāsāmanta sindarabhīmarasaru © parahitaneṁba satyaparaneṁba guṇāgraṇiyeṁba dharmmatatparataraneṁba sinda
nirekanmmaneṁdu parahitaneṁba satyavaraneṁba guṇāgraṇiyeṁba dharmmatatparataraneṁba sindavasudharmma
na rājasabhāntarāḷadoḷ © lalita śrīkritakāḷa dvāpāre muḷugundaṁ kali
yugarammyaṁ . © Antā nālkuyugadoḷ prasiddhamāgi negarddādivaṭṭaṇa muḷugundada ballavaseṭṭi dharmmaseṭṭi kritayugaseṭṭikoḷa
garaseṭṭi modalāgi mūnūrvvarsse gāmuṇḍugaḷu Uṁca beḷḷāḷa modalāgi nūṟirppadiṁba rmmahājanamuṁ sāliga rayvadiṁ
baruṁ telliga rnnūṟirppadiṁbaruṁ māligāṟaṟe yivadaṇburuṁ paṁcamaṭhasthānamumirddu sakavarṣa voṁbhayinūṟeṇbhatta nālkeneya śubhakri
tsaṁvatsarada pauṣya suddhapaṁcami sōmavāra muttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁtiyandu nagaradaū roḍeyaṁ beḷḷāḷa sōyimayyana mānya dayvattuma
ttaroḷage dravyapūrvvakadiṁ māṟu�ṇḍu nagarēśvaradalirppa tapōdhanargge yaśanācchādana nimittamāge © yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyāna
dhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīḷasaṁpannarappa śrīmadgaṅgarāsipaṇḍitadēvara pādārādhakarappa druvēśvarapaṇḍitadēvara pāda
prakṣāḷanaṁgeydunagarēśvarada gaḍiṁbada kōloḷ koṇḍu koṭṭa mattarere pannēḷu Ā keyya sameko ṟe ladiṁ māguṇḍiga pōda Aḍḍavaṭṭepaḍu
vaṇa mēre baḍaga seṭṭi volaṁ mēre mūḍaluṁ teṁkalu mavara mānyame mēre © dhāraṇahāraṇa bratadoḷiṁtoḍa laṁjade māḍi naiṣṭhikāyā
tadoḷoppikūḍi sivapūjaneyaṁ balavandu māḍi saṁsārasukhakke darppaviṣayaṅgaḷa nēḷisikāḍiyāḍi kāmāriya narcci
salke nalidirppa munīśvara nī dhruvēśvara . © manameṁbaṁkusadindaydene yiṁdriyagajamanugidu viṣayaṁ tanage
taledōṟaleṁbidavene negardda munīśvaraṁ dhruvēśvaradēva . © vṛtta © munigaḷoḷā mahāmuni dhruvēśvarapaṇḍitarī jagatra
yaṁ pogaḷe tapaḻprabhāva nidhi dore padmasaṁbhavaṁ dore muni yā vasiṣṭhamuniyuṁ samanāda naghastyanuttamaṁ sa
riyene baṇṇisalu tribhuvanaṁ pogaḷuttire yāmunīśa nuttama vira pūjyamāgi nagarēśvaradī maṭha moppi tōṟuguṁ ©
naralōkadoḷiṁnilliya bharamaṁ tāḷdiṁtu peṟage gurukuḷatiḷekaṁ paramaguru besase duritāduritāpaha nīnu nindanī śrī
munipa . śrīkaṁṭhamuniye kamaḷamukhākaṁṭhaṁ sēvya sēvyamūrtti gurukuḷatiḷakaṁ śrīkaṇṭhavenisi parahita nī kaṇṭhamunī
nalte vasudhātaḷadoḷ . maṭhamidu naiṣṭhikamaṭhami maṭhada tapōdharmma The letters
beḷḷeya dēvara saratiya maṭhaṁ © Intidaṁ pratipāḷisidōṁ vāraṇāsi gurukṣētraprayāge gaṅgāsāgara śrīparvvatavēṁba pu
ṇyatīrttha sthānadoḷsāyira kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnaṅgaḷoḷkaṭṭisi mahāritvijarkka ḷkubhayamukhigoṭṭa
phaḷa mada naḷida ninituma naḷidu narakaṁbokka paṁcamahāpātakanakku bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ yasya
yasya yadā bhūmi tasyatasya tadā phaḷaṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nṛpāṁṇā kāḷēkāḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētāṁ bhāgi
naḻpārtthivēndrāṁ bhūyōbhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi
viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . madvaṁśajāḥ paramahīpativaṁśajā vā pāpādapētya manasā bhuvi bhūmibhūpā yē pāḷayanti
mama dharmmamidaṁ samastaṁ tēṣāṁ mayā viracitāṁjaḷirēṣa mūrdhni . Anupamatarākṣaraṁ budhajanamaṁ jīyanisa sakaḷavidyāniḷa
yaṁmanumunicāritra nī sāsanamaṁ mannayara basavaṇayyaṁ baredaṁ . purikara nagarada bammaṁ sarasvatīgaṇada dāsi kaṇṭha
nirutayatisaṭaṁ khaṇḍarisidaṁ nāgavarmmana cchātraṁ .
Digital edition of SII 11.97 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
